_instructions.howToUse: Add one object per date (YYYY-MM-DD). The generator finds today's entry automatically, or you can pick a date manually in the tool.

fields.date: YYYY-MM-DD — the date this verse is posted
fields.quote: The verse text. Use \n for a manual line break. Wrap 1-3 words with **like this** to make them the large accent color (matches the 'YOKE' / 'LIGHT' style in the sample).
fields.day: Weekday label for the side ribbon, e.g. 'Thursday'
fields.greeting: Bottom-right message, e.g. 'Good Morning, God Bless You'
fields.includeJesus: true/false — whether the AI background image should depict Jesus (as a warm, tasteful, non-photoreal illustrated/silhouette figure). Set false for scenery-only days (sunrise, nature, a person praying from behind, etc).
fields.scene: Short plain description of the background scene, e.g. 'a young man sitting on a rooftop ledge at sunrise, city skyline below, birds and a feather floating'
fields.mood: 1-3 words for lighting/mood, e.g. 'golden hour, warm, peaceful'
fields.imagePromptOverride: OPTIONAL. If set, this exact text is sent to the image generator instead of the auto-built prompt from scene/mood/includeJesus.

notes: Keep 'scene' generic and reverent — no named/copyrighted characters, no real people.

For includeJesus:true days, the prompt intentionally asks for a soft, painterly/illustrative treatment (robed figure, warm light) rather than a hyper-real photo, which tends to look more respectful and on-brand.
Costs: images are generated for free via Pollinations (no API key). If you switch to a paid image API later, imagePromptOverride is the field to feed it.

verses.scene: a young man sitting on a rooftop ledge at sunrise, city skyline below, birds and a single white feather floating in the sky
verses.mood: golden hour, warm, peaceful, soft haze

verses.quote: 'I am the **light** of the world.\nWhoever follows me will\nnever walk in darkness.'
verses.scene: a robed figure with a soft halo of light walking down a quiet sunlit path through tall trees, gentle rays breaking through the canopy
verses.mood: soft painterly illustration, warm backlight, reverent, gentle

verses.scene: a green rolling hillside meadow at dawn with a small flock of sheep grazing near a wooden fence, mist in the distant valley

verses.quote: 'I can do all things\nthrough Christ who\n**strengthens** me.'
verses.scene: a woman standing at the top of a mountain trail at sunrise, arms slightly open, valley and clouds below
verses.mood: epic golden light, uplifting, wide open sky
